mapper.sql: id, energy_code, energy_name, category, unit, conversion_factor, carbon_factor, order_num, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_energy WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_energy (energy_code, energy_name, category, unit, conversion_factor, carbon_factor, order_num, status, create_by) VALUES (#{energyCode}, #{energyName}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{conversionFactor}, #{carbonFactor}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_energy
energy_name = #{energyName}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, conversion_factor = #{conversionFactor}, carbon_factor = #{carbonFactor}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_energy SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
